exceptions.reachability: The crate is Linux-only Tauri GTK infrastructure; AntennaBench has no direct VariantStr or VariantStrIter calls, but framework reachability cannot be excluded.
exceptions.rationale: The fix requires glib 0.20 or newer while Tauri's current GTK dependency remains on the incompatible glib 0.18 line.
exceptions.mitigation: Avoid the affected iterator API, retain Linux CI coverage, and track a Tauri or GTK upgrade in issue 83 before the exception expires.

exceptions.reachability: The root data is used by reqwest and hyper-rustls when the optional NOAA HTTPS adapter performs a live request.
exceptions.rationale: This is the only locked license outside the general allowlist and it is restricted to the exact CA-root data crate version.
exceptions.mitigation: Track distribution notice obligations in issue 82 and retain the license text or select a reviewed native-root strategy before expiry.
